raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Californians consistently pay the highest gas prices in the nation.",
    "The Cap-and-Trade program increases gas prices by roughly 27 cents per gallon.",
    "A proposed gas tax suspension could lower gas costs by 60 cents per gallon.",
    "There is a proposed regulation that may make it harder and more expensive to import fuel into California.",
    "A refinery storage mandate could increase gas prices and create fuel shortages."
  ]
}
```
